description:

It has been a week since the first time Starfire and Robin had "the sex" as Starfire call it, something that was supposed to be a good and thrilling experience wasn't it, Wonder Boy wasn't as wonderful as his nickname says. 

The good part is, Raven kept your affair even after november ended and she's is willing to let Starfire experience the pleasure she has been getting from you.

(This works as a continuation from my Raven bo, hence the reason of this being a full on Netori instead optional, even if you can reject Starfire.)
